## Type of Change

<!-- Select the type of change (affects automatic versioning via commit messages): -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (patch bump - use `fix:` in commits)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (minor bump - use `feat:` in commits)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (major bump - use `BREAKING CHANGE:` in commits)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test improvement

## Commit Messages

**Important:** This project uses automated semantic versioning based on commit messages.

Use semantic commit messages:
```bash
# For bug fixes (patch bump):
git commit -m "fix: resolve OAuth token refresh issue"

# For new features (minor bump):
git commit -m "feat: add Google Secret Manager support"

# For breaking changes (major bump):
git commit -m "BREAKING CHANGE: refactor configuration format"
```

See [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) for more details.
